channel.description: Recent content in Edge on Dodoslav - eBlog

item.title: Edge Loadbalancer manual
item.description: Vypnutie: dscontrol manager stop dscontrol executor stop dsserver stop Zapnutie: dsserver start Kontrola: dscontrol manager report dscontrol highavailability status Prepnutie zo StandBy do Primary: dscontrol highavailability takeover
